summary: Tested exercise naming & categorization overrides (EXERCISE_NAME_OVERRIDES, EXERCISE_TARGET_OVERRIDES, reverse text search). 26/28 tests pass (92.9%). All critical cross-category features work — Barbell Back Squat under legs/glutes, Deadlift under back/glutes, Bench Press under triceps, reverse text search working. ONE BUG: 'Leg Press Machine' display name never appears because the EXERCISE_NAME_OVERRIDES key 'lever leg press' doesn't match any actual MongoDB document name — ExerciseDB stores the standard leg press as 'sled 45° leg press' not 'lever leg press'.

minor.issue: EXERCISE_NAME_OVERRIDES key 'lever leg press' → 'Leg Press Machine' never fires because no exercise in MongoDB has name='lever leg press'. ExerciseDB actual raw name is 'sled 45° leg press' (target=glutes). Fix: add 'sled 45° leg press' → 'Leg Press Machine' (and sled variants) to both EXERCISE_NAME_OVERRIDES and EXERCISE_TARGET_OVERRIDES. EXERCISE_TARGET_OVERRIDES['lever leg press'] also needs the same key fix.

action_items: Fix EXERCISE_NAME_OVERRIDES: replace key 'lever leg press' with 'sled 45° leg press' → 'Leg Press Machine'. Also add 'lever seated leg press' if it exists in DB. Verify actual raw DB names before adding.
Fix EXERCISE_TARGET_OVERRIDES: replace key 'lever leg press' with 'sled 45° leg press' → ['legs', 'glutes']. Also update 'lever seated leg press' if needed.
Consider also adding 'sled 45° leg wide press', 'sled 45 degrees one leg press' to EXERCISE_NAME_OVERRIDES for consistent naming.
critical_code_review_comments: EXERCISE_NAME_OVERRIDES and EXERCISE_TARGET_OVERRIDES use 'lever leg press' as a key, but ExerciseDB stores the standard leg press machine as 'sled 45° leg press'. This is a key-name mismatch — the override is defined but never triggers. The mapping in CACHED_EXERCISE_GIFS correctly uses 'sled leg press' → '0739' (the correct ExerciseDB ID) which further confirms the DB name is 'sled 45° leg press' not 'lever leg press'.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing exercise_library MongoDB collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical cross-category features working: muscle=legs→Barbell Back Squat(total_count=384), muscle=glutes→Barbell Back Squat(total_count=327), search=back+squat→Barbell Back Squat(reverse lookup), search=skull+crusher→Skull Crushers, muscle=triceps→Barbell Bench Press(total_count=418), muscle=back→Deadlift(total_count=377). ONE FAILING: search=leg+press does NOT return 'Leg Press Machine' (fix: see action_items). Rerun test_exercise_name_target_overrides.py after fix to confirm all 28 pass.

test_results.TEST1_legs_barbell_back_squat: PASS - Barbell Back Squat in legs chip (total_count=384 > 250)
test_results.TEST2_glutes_barbell_back_squat: PASS - Barbell Back Squat in glutes chip (total_count=327 > 200)
test_results.TEST3_search_back_squat_reverse_lookup: PASS - search='back squat' returns ['Barbell Back Squat', 'Low Bar Back Squat']
test_results.TEST4_search_skull_crusher: PASS - search='skull crusher' returns ['Skull Crushers', 'Barbell Lying Triceps Extension Skull Crusher']
test_results.TEST5_triceps_bench_press: PASS - Barbell Bench Press appears under triceps chip (compound cross-category)
test_results.TEST6_back_deadlift: PASS - 'Deadlift' appears under back chip (deadlift override → back)
test_results.TEST7_search_leg_press_machine: FAIL - 'Leg Press Machine' NOT in results; actual leg press exercises: ['Sled 45° Leg Press', 'Sled 45 Degrees One Leg Press', ...]. Root cause: EXERCISE_NAME_OVERRIDES key 'lever leg press' has no matching DB document
test_results.TEST10_no_regressions: PASS - chest, shoulders, abs, back all return relevant exercises without regression

rca_of_issue: Leg Press Machine missing RCA: EXERCISE_NAME_OVERRIDES uses 'lever leg press' as key (from ExerciseDB API taxonomy), but the actual exercise_library MongoDB collection stores it as 'sled 45° leg press'. The CACHED_EXERCISE_GIFS dict correctly maps 'sled leg press' to exercise ID '0739' which confirms the correct DB name. To reproduce: GET /api/exercises/search?search=lever+leg+press returns 0 results; GET /api/exercises/search?search=sled+45+leg+press returns 3 results with target=glutes. Mitigation: Update EXERCISE_NAME_OVERRIDES key from 'lever leg press' to 'sled 45° leg press' (and similar sled variants) and do the same in EXERCISE_TARGET_OVERRIDES.
